title: Localparam array can't be passed into parameter-called function

features.name: localparam unpacked array of integers
features.description: Code should include a localparam declaration with an unpacked array type containing integer values

features.name: function with unpacked array input parameter
features.description: Code should include a function that accepts an unpacked array as an input parameter

features.name: localparam array passed to function call
features.description: Code should include a localparam with an unpacked array type being passed as an argument to a function call
